calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: Minimal Vertebrate Cognition Ablation -- E1+E2+hippocampus core loop
items.notes: Milestone architecture validation. Strips commitment architecture (commitment_threshold=-1.0, z_goal_enabled=False, benefit_eval_enabled=False). Tests whether core E1/E2/hippocampus loop gradient-follows on raw env signals. Sidesteps SD-011/SD-012 blockers. PASS criteria: C1 reward > random, C2 harm < random, C4 learning within warmup (all >= 2/3 seeds).

items.title: SD-003 Full Latent Counterfactual Attribution on z_harm_s (post-SD-011)
items.notes: Full latent z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline. Uses ResidualHarmForward (now in ree_core) to avoid identity collapse. Transposition of EXQ-030b (z_world) to z_harm_s. EXQ-166e validated scalar proxy; this validates the full latent version.

items.title: MECH-033 E2 kernel chain pair (chain vs no-chain, 3-seed replication)
items.note: MECH-033 3-seed replication (extends EXQ-171 2-seed). KERNEL_CHAIN vs NO_CHAIN greedy avoidance. 600 warmup + 50 eval eps per seed.

items.title: ARC-018 rollout viability pair (viability_mapped vs viability_ablated)
items.note: ARC-018 discriminative pair: VIABILITY_MAPPED (ResidueField + HippocampalModule CEM terrain) vs VIABILITY_ABLATED (residue field zeroed). Real ree_core modules. Fixes EXQ-172 inline-module issue. 3 seeds.

items.title: ARC-030 COMBINED selector redesign (harm+goal vs harm-only, precond check)
items.notes: COMBINED (harm+goal CEM scoring) vs HARM_ONLY (harm-only, z_goal ablated). Precondition: z_goal_norm > 0.1 after warmup. 3 seeds x 300 warmup + 300 eval x 200 steps. PASS: benefit_ratio>=1.2 AND harm_ratio<=1.3.

items.title: ARC-029 discrepancy diagnostic (EXQ-063 vs EXQ-125 conditions reproduced)
items.notes: Diagnostic: reproduce EXQ-063 exact conditions (seeds=[0,1]) and EXQ-125 exact conditions (seeds=[42,123]) to identify why 063 PASS while 125 FAIL. PASS: EXQ-063 conditions still reproduce harm_gap_stable > 0.

items.title: MECH-116 / ARC-032 theta-bypass ablation (theta_buffer zeroed vs enabled)
items.notes: THETA_BYPASS_ENABLED vs THETA_BYPASS_DISABLED (theta_buffer zeroed after each update). E1 goal-conditioned in both. Measures E1 prediction error in goal-zone vs neutral-zone. PASS: goal-relevant error increases when theta disabled (margin>0.02, interaction>0.01) in >= 2/3 seeds. evidence_direction_per_claim required.

items.title: MECH-128 E1 goal-conditioning pair (GOAL_CONDITIONED vs GOAL_ABLATED)
items.notes: GOAL_CONDITIONED (e1.goal_dim=32) vs GOAL_ABLATED (e1.goal_dim=0). drive_weight=2.0. 3 seeds x 400 warmup + 100 eval x 200 steps. PASS: interaction>=0.005 in >=2/3 seeds, goal-relevant E1 error lower in GOAL_CONDITIONED, neutral error similar. C4 (z_goal_norm > 0.05) required in all seeds.
